publishedAbstract: - When Object Storage is configured to replicate data to another bucket both internally or externally, the functionality of the replication is Asynchronous- I can't find a way to identify the period time for Asynchronous replica- I can't find a way to tweak the period time for Asynchronous replica- I am in need of Synchronous replication **Related Articles:** [Replicating Objects to External Multicloud Object Gateway (MCG) Buckets- OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF)](https://access.redhat.com/solutions/7083047)
publishedTitle: How to Increase The Multicloud Object Gateway (MCG/NooBaa) Replication Speed - OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF)
